title: [IOS]App Settings - General - Account - Log in - Log out - Cancel
scenario: Verify login/logout flow in Account settings: user can log in, see account details, and cancel logout to remain logged in.
steps: Start the app as a quest, tap the App Settings icon, then go to General > Account.
Tap Log in, then Continue, and log in with valid credentials.
Verify that 'Your account' text is visible with Name and Email fields populated.
Tap Log out and verify that a login dialog opens with Cancel and Continue options.
Tap Cancel and verify that the dialog disappears and the user remains logged in.
expected: After logging in, 'Your account' text is visible with Name and Email fields populated. After tapping Log out, a login dialog appears with Cancel and Continue options. After tapping Cancel, the dialog disappears and the user remains logged in.
